plugins.name: pm-team
plugins.description: Multi-agent product management team that gathers intent, produces feature specs, gates them through a reviewer, opens a spec PR, and on approval seeds the Azure DevOps or GitHub Kanban board with work items for handoff to dev-team.

plugins.name: dev-team
plugins.description: Multi-agent software development team that drives a work item from Azure DevOps or GitHub through design, parallel implementation, code review, and PR creation.

plugins.name: assistant-wizard
plugins.description: Designs and generates new custom subagents, skills, slash commands, chat modes, and prompt files for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot.

plugins.name: mcp-tool-architect
plugins.description: Designs decision-ready MCP tool architectures and emits durable spec/guardrails/success-criteria docs.
